clinic-scheduler.title: Clinic scheduler
clinic-scheduler.description: Books a doctor appointment by voice, finds open slots, and handles reschedules.
clinic-scheduler.who_for: Clinics and GP offices that want to automate appointment booking without a phone tree.

drive-thru-coffee.title: Drive-thru coffee
drive-thru-coffee.description: Takes a coffee order, modifies items mid-flow, totals the cart.
drive-thru-coffee.who_for: Cafes that want voice ordering without ripping out their POS.

front-desk-interpreter.title: Front desk interpreter
front-desk-interpreter.description: Two languages, one front desk. Real-time, both directions.
front-desk-interpreter.who_for: Hotels and front desks that serve international guests without bilingual staff on every shift.

quick-trivia.title: Quick trivia
quick-trivia.description: Quizzes the caller with one short trivia question at a time and keeps score.
quick-trivia.who_for: Anyone who wants a quick voice-based trivia game or wants to see live score UI updates.

tenant-rights.title: Tenant rights
tenant-rights.description: Answers US renter questions from public HUD guidance, names the source out loud, and redirects to legal help when a question goes past the documents. Runs on NVIDIA by default, or OpenAI when only OPENAI_API_KEY is set.
tenant-rights.who_for: Housing nonprofits and legal-aid teams that want a grounded, safe first-line voice helper for renters.

water-tracker.title: Water tracker
water-tracker.description: Logs glasses of water by voice and tracks progress toward a daily goal.
water-tracker.who_for: Anyone who wants a voice-powered hydration reminder throughout the day.
